description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service. Define a single stage named build and a job called build that runs in this stage. In the build job export IMAGE_TAG by converting $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME to a safe tag (export IMAGE_TAG=$(echo -en $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME | tr -c '[:alnum:]_.-' '-')), then log in to the GitLab Container Registry with docker login -u "gitlab-ci-token" -p "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" $CI_REGISTRY, build the image with docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG" ., and push it with docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG". The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
